results.title: Brazil rallies for 1-1 draw against Morocco in its World Cup opener behind Vinícius Júnior's goal
results.description: Vinícius Júnior scored an equalizing goal in the 32nd minute to give five-time champion Brazil a 1-1 draw against Morocco in a pulsating, high-profile group match at the World Cup. A semifinalist four years ago, Morocco dominated early, and Ismael...
